name: Richard Wagner

acts.description: Wrote Das Judenthum in der Musik, a virulent anti-Semitic essay attacking Jewish composers
His work and writings were instrumentalized as foundational to Nazi ideology; Hitler was a devoted Wagnerian

behavior_summary: The most influential opera composer in history was also a virulent anti-Semite whose writings and ideology became pillars of Nazi culture. Hitler visited Bayreuth obsessively.

art.summary: Transformed opera permanently. Invented leitmotif. His influence on music, drama, cinema, and philosophy is without equal. Also Hitler's favorite composer.

verdict.blurb: He wrote some of the most transcendent music in Western history and also wrote a pamphlet arguing that Jews were corrupting German culture. The Nazis put his music in the gas chambers. His great-granddaughter has spent her life trying to clean up the family name. Israel still won't play him.
